description_long: This is a rectangular wooden cabinet or shelf structure with a flat, broad top surface and a partially open front section. The exterior is finished in a medium brown wood grain, while the interior features a darker wood floor and a large, rough stone or rock formation occupying one side. Scattered books and small objects are visible on the floor inside, suggesting it is used for storage or display. The front has a large arched opening, possibly for easy access or as a decorative feature. The back and sides are solid wood panels, with no visible openings or handles.
description: A rectangular wooden cabinet with a broad top, arched front opening, and a stone feature inside, used for storage or display.
description_view_0: Front view showing the arched opening, interior stone, and scattered books on the floor.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the broad wooden surface and partial view of the interior contents.
description_view_2: View of the arched opening with the stone feature visible inside, showing the main access point.
description_view_3: Solid wooden back panel with no openings or features visible.
